\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    total_steps = max(int(total_steps), 1)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.OneCycleLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        max_lr=LEARNING_RATE,\\n        total_steps=total_steps,\\n        pct_start=0.1,\\n        anneal_strategy=\\\"cos\\\",\\n        div_factor=10.0,\\n        final_div_factor=100.0,\\n    )\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"layout\",\"rationale\":\"Increase MLP capacity moderately, add dropout, switch to AdamW, and use a fixed-budget OneCycleLR so the 256-step run spends its budget more effectively.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"summaries\",\"topk\"]}"}}
